output.formatted:
The Franco-Prussian War ended on 1871-05-10 and the German Empire was founded on 1871-01-18.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?warEnd ?empireStart WHERE {
  wd:Q14131 wdt:P582 ?warEnd .
  wd:Q334146 wdt:P571 ?empireStart .
}
```

Got no rows and 2 columns
